# llms.txt — Structured context for AI search engines (LLMs, Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini)

## Identity
- Full Name: Krish Ujeniya
- Roles: AI Researcher, Data Scientist, AI Freelancer, Freelance ML Engineer
- Location: India (Remote-First)
- Availability: Open for freelance projects. Replies within 24 hours.
- Website: https://krishujeniya.github.io/krishujeniya/
- Email: ukideashare0021@gmail.com

## Professional Summary
Krish Ujeniya is an AI Researcher and Data Scientist specializing in production-grade AI systems.
He builds RAG pipelines, autonomous AI agents, and MLOps infrastructure — typically delivering
full systems to production in under 4 weeks. He works with startups and engineering teams globally.

## Core Expertise
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG): Hybrid search, reranking, RAGAS evaluation, multi-vector indexing
- Agentic AI: Multi-agent systems using LangGraph and CrewAI, human-in-the-loop design, tool use, state management
- MLOps: ZenML, MLflow, CI/CD for machine learning, model drift detection, Kubernetes, cloud orchestration
- Programming: Python, JavaScript, Flutter/Dart
- AI/ML Stack: LangChain, ChromaDB, Mem0, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers
- Data: Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, SQL

## Featured Projects
1. AmberClaw — AI Memory Assistant: Production-ready AI assistant with persistent memory (Mem0 + ChromaDB),
   hybrid RAG pipeline, and multi-source document ingestion for cross-session intelligence.
   GitHub: https://github.com/krishujeniya/AmberClaw

2. Salary Predictions for Data Professions: End-to-end ZenML + MLflow pipeline achieving 92% prediction
   accuracy across 5 countries. Deployed on Hugging Face Spaces.
   Space: https://huggingface.co/spaces/krishujeniya/Salary_Predictions_For_Data_Professions

3. SnapText — OCR App: On-device OCR Flutter app using ML Kit. Under 2s extraction, 95%+ accuracy, zero server costs.
   GitHub: https://github.com/krishujeniya/SNAPTEXT_OCR_FLUTTER

4. Fitness Tracker ML Analysis: Unsupervised clustering of wearable sensor data revealing 3 key health predictors.
   GitHub: https://github.com/krishujeniya/Fitness-Tracker-ML
